subcodes.title: Words spoken at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-02-24
subcodes.first_line: In this Bahá’í Dispensation the question of deeds is most important. Confession and acknowledgement do not mean faith. Faith means deeds and deeds mean faith.
subcodes.subjects: @goodly deeds; actions, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @love and unity, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @definitions of a Baha'i; qualities of a Baha'i
